title: phase-b-close-beads output
description: JSON emitted by phase-b-close-beads.sh (Step 16b). Harvests close reasons, closes in-progress beads, ingests metrics, and syncs Dolt. Exit 3 = one or more beads missing a close reason (partial JSON with missing_reason list). Exit 0 = all beads closed (or no in-progress beads). The closed list is used by Step 17 (What's New synthesis) without extra bd show calls.

closed.description: Beads successfully closed in this run. Used by Step 17 for What's New generation.

type.description: Bead type for What's New derivation (feat/fix/chore/refactor/task/bug)

title.description: Bead title for What's New synthesis

close_reason.description: 1-line close reason harvested from bead notes

close_failed.description: Beads for which bd close returned non-zero. These beads were NOT closed — caller should investigate and retry.

missing_reason.description: Bead IDs that have no 'Close reason:' note. Non-empty = exit 3. Caller must compose reasons and rerun.

skipped_not_owned.description: Bead IDs skipped because CCP_SESSION_ID is set and the bead's assignee does not match this session. These beads are NOT closed — they belong to a different session.

status.description: ok=synced, failed=dolt error (non-blocking), skipped=dry-run or no beads
ok=all ingested, partial=some failed (non-blocking), skipped=no plugin lib or dry-run
